Fig. 5. Top causal effects estimated using MSM–IPTW models across substance use initiation outcomes (FDR q < 0.05). Points represent estimated odds ratios with 95% confidence intervals. Panel (A): alcohol initiation; panel (B): any substance initiation; panel (C): cannabis initiation; panel (D): nicotine initiation.
